title: alternanthera bahiensis
intro: Alternanthera bahiensis, also known as Brazilian joyweed, is a species of flowering plant in the family Amaranthaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Alternanthera bahiensis include its ability to help reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat various skin conditions, such as wounds and eczema. Herbal preparations of Alternanthera bahiensis can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be taken internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
